text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I can do it today. I can reach that new level of
speed.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I don't need anything. And I won't look back. I
will keep my eyes forward and run.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka's focus is incredible... Just look at her
eyes.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Um, Suzuka! Good lu...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Suzuka...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's finally arrived, the Otherworldly
Front-Runner, Silence Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Her presence is something else! I can feel it all the
way over here. You can tell she's improved
beyond her own limits.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I promise. I'll make it this time.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I alone will arrive at that world no one has ever
seen.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Who is that? It feels...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Y-you're...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Nice to see you, Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
The day has finally arrived. I'm very pleased that
we could be here together.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Bright... Is that really you?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You've changed so much since spring.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Like you, I've polished myself into something spectacular. I polished our running abilities until they gleamed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I will show each and every one of those abilities
to you on the turf.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm sure you will. But...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I won't let you catch up to me... You won't. No
one will...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
(Suzuka is in incredible form today, I can tell.
Still...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
(I have come prepared with the new ideal of the
Mejiros.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
(Watch me, Trainer. And my sisters, with your
guidance...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
(May we bathe this track in the light of the Mejiro
family!)
